description: Held-out evaluation set for the Hams Levantine/English code-switching TTS. 18 utterances spanning pure Levantine Arabic, pure English, and code-switched. Arabic is provided diacritised so the rule-based Levantine G2P (high-quality path) is exercised; in production the diacritiser (CATT/CAMeL) restores tashkeel automatically. `levantine_tokens` flags dialect-specific realisations to check in pronunciation-accuracy notes.

utterances.text: مَرحَبا، كِيفَك؟ إن شاء الله مْنيح.
utterances.gloss: Hello, how are you? Hopefully well.

utterances.text: بَدّي روح عَ السّوق وَ إشتْري خُبِز وَ لَبَن.
utterances.gloss: I want to go to the market and buy bread and milk.
What are you doing right now?
The weather is very nice today in Beirut.

utterances.text: ما تِنسى تِحْكيلي لَمّا تُوصَل عَ البيت.
utterances.gloss: Don't forget to tell me when you get home.
This is the best restaurant in town, try it.

utterances.text: Hello, how are you doing today?
Please confirm your appointment for tomorrow at nine.
I would like to book a flight from Beirut to London.
Streaming audio with very low latency is genuinely challenging.
Thank you for calling. How can I help you today?
The model runs in real time on a single L4 GPU.
مَرحَبا، أنا Hams، your voice assistant.
utterances.gloss: Hello, I am Hams, your voice assistant.

utterances.text: بَدّي إحجِز flight من بيروت to London بُكرا الساعة 9.
utterances.gloss: I want to book a flight from Beirut to London tomorrow at nine.

utterances.text: الـ meeting الساعة 3:30، please don't be late.
utterances.gloss: The meeting is at 3:30, please don't be late.

utterances.text: هَيدا المَشروع عَن الـ TTS، it's really exciting.
utterances.gloss: This project is about TTS, it's really exciting.

utterances.text: عَم بَشتَغِل عَ الـ deployment عَ NVIDIA L4 هَلَّق.
utterances.gloss: I'm working on the deployment on NVIDIA L4 right now.

utterances.text: إذا في عندَك أي question، اسأَلني بأي وَقت، okay?
utterances.gloss: If you have any question, ask me any time, okay?
